# validate should return current form state

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
I am always frustrated when I have to perform 2 lines instead of one when it comes to check whether my form is valid or not!

**Describe the solution you'd like**
When I perform a form.validate I want to know directly whether it is valid or not.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Alternative would be to write 2 lines and have a random line out there, that is saying "form.validate()"
